sourcePrompt: A 105mm howitzer emplacement, a circular sandbagged gun pit about eight meters across. The howitzer centers it - a long barrel angled up over the parapet, a shield plate, two splayed trail legs and two rubber tires - while ammunition crates and a powder canister stack against the inside of the chest-high sandbag ring. Sandbags and olive-drab. Low-poly, blocky, modular; simple readable silhouette.
